titleZh: 清算义务人责任与怠于清算风险解析
titleEn: Liquidation Obligations and Liability for Failure to Liquidate under the 2023 Company Law Amendment
abstractZh: 围绕新《公司法》后清算义务人制度变更，讨论董事在怠于清算中的责任承担与实务操作要点。
abstractEn: Explains post-amendment changes to liquidation responsibility and practical issues in pursuing liability where liquidation duties are not fulfilled.
